content: Toast POS adds items to an already-sent check via the Stay button: selecting new items and choosing Stay sends only the newly selected items to the kitchen while any held items remain held; the server stays on the order screen. Server Item Firing (opt-in feature) generalizes this: items default to a per-item Send/Hold state, and firing sends only the selected/unfired subset, never re-firing already-sent items. Course firing (a distinct trigger, same mechanism) sends only that course's unfired items to the KDS.
